description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on every push to develop and master branches, on push to tags matching [0-9]*, on every pull request to any branch, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has multiple jobs for building and testing on different platforms including ubuntu-20.04, ubuntu-latest, macos-11, and windows-2019. It checks out the repository, sets up dependencies, and performs various build and test operations using CMake, ninja, and other tools.
